docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, KINSON K. DBA R & G LOUNGE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PESSIS, MICHAEL A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, KINSON K.
